_guide.title: ToxiScan — Chemical Add Karne Ka Template
steps: 1. Is file se ek chemical ka block copy karo (examples section se)
2. MongoDB Atlas UI kholo → toxiscan → chemicals → Insert Document
3. JSON paste karo, values apni chemical ke hisaab se badlo
4. '_guide' aur '_examples' fields DELETE karo before inserting

severity_guide.High: Carcinogen confirmed / banned in EU or US / strong endocrine disruptor
severity_guide.Medium: Possible carcinogen / restricted / known irritant / contamination risk

_guide.aliases_tip: Jitne zyada aliases, utna better fuzzy matching. INCI name, common name, brand names, abbreviations — sab daalo.
_guide.research_url_tip: Agar URL nahi pata toh null rakho — Tavily automatically search karega.

example_high_severity.name: Butylparaben
example_high_severity.description: Strongest endocrine disruption among common parabens. Linked to breast cancer cell proliferation and reproductive harm.

example_medium_severity.name: Phenoxyethanol
example_medium_severity.description: Common preservative. Can cause skin, eye, and lung irritation. France warned against use in products for babies under 3.

example_low_severity.name: Isopropyl Myristate
example_low_severity.description: Emollient and penetration enhancer. Can clog pores and cause comedonal acne. Also enhances absorption of other harmful ingredients.

_blank_template.COPY_THIS: Yeh blank template copy karo aur fill karo
_blank_template.name: Chemical Ka Official INCI Ya Common Name
_blank_template.description: 1-2 line mein clearly batao yeh chemical kyu harmful hai. Plain language mein — user chemistry expert nahi hai.
